name: tabkan
description: Turn Chrome's native tab groups into a visual Kanban board.
author: Bjorn Byrne (https://www.bjornbyrne.com)

scripts.check: for f in background.js sidepanel.js popup.js src/*.js scripts/smoke.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node --input-type=commonjs -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); console.log('manifest.json valid')"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke
